---
title: "Paper Map: NeurIPS / CVPR / ICLR / ICML 2024–2025"
date: 2026-05-13
description: "Interactive 2D map of ~26,700 papers from the top ML/CV venues."
categories: [tools, literature, visualization]
image: /wp-assets/uploads/2019/02/3opt.png
image-alt: "Interactive paper map preview"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Open full screen: [papers_map.html](/papers_map.html).

<iframe
  src="/papers_map.html"
  width="100%"
  height="900"
  style="border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color); border-radius:10px;"
  loading="lazy"
  title="Interactive paper map">
</iframe>
